attempts.coverage_policy: valid/test drugs and diseases remain in train approved target relation

label_policy.failed_like_pairs: Reserved for diagnostic/negative evidence; not used as positive labels
label_policy.conflict_policy: If a pair is both approved and failed-like, keep as approved positive and remove from failed-like diagnostic set.

mapping_policy.disease_mapping_to_drkg: Probe exact CUI forms; if weak, use repoDB-local UMLS disease nodes
mapping_policy.day3_graph_policy: Build repoDB target graph and optionally attach DRKG evidence for mapped compounds/diseases.
